name: harness-creator
description: Claude Code のハーネス — Capability (Skill / Agent / Hook / Command / Plugin-Composition / Prompt / Workflow) と評価・統治機構の総体 — を構築・評価・統治するメタプラグイン。単体スキル生成は部品単位の能力として内包する。run-build-skill は with-goal-seek の engine:task-graph 変種 (brief.goal_seek.engine=task-graph 指定時に checklist の depends_on 依存充足順で実行し self-reflect で発見タスクを単一 truth の checklist へ追記する) を、既定装備の with-goal-seek 内部の opt-in engine 選択として焼き込む

interface.longDescription: Create, validate, and govern skills, hooks, commands, agents, prompts, workflows, and plugin composition while preserving product-native loading contracts.
defaultPrompt: Build a repository capability from its handoff plan.
Check Claude and Codex native settings for drift.
Review this plugin against its capability contracts.
